message:
feat(ad): implement JVP rules for multi-output decompositions (Eigh, QR, SVD)

Add jvp_rule_multi() dispatch for primitives that produce multiple
output tensors, replacing the previous fallback that zeroed all
tangents for multi-output equations.

Eigh JVP (A = V diag(w) V^T):
- Compute M = V^T dA V
- dw = diag(M) for eigenvalue tangents
- dV = V (F ⊙ M) where F[i,j] = 1/(w[j]-w[i]) for the eigenvector tangents
- Handles degenerate eigenvalue gaps with epsilon guard

QR JVP (A = QR):
- Compute C = Q^T dA
- Solve for antisymmetric Ω via forward substitution on the lower triangle
- dR = triu(C - ΩR), dQ = QΩ
- Handles rank-deficient R diagonal with epsilon guard

SVD JVP (A = UΣV^T):
- Compute dΣ = diag(U^T dA V) for singular value tangents
- Compute F matrices from singular value gaps for U and V tangents
- dU = U(F_u ⊙ (U^T dA V)) and dV via analogous construction
- Handles degenerate singular values with epsilon guard

Also adds helper functions: matmul_f64, build_matrix_f64, and
build_diagonal_f64 for dense matrix operations needed by the
decomposition JVP rules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
